payload.title: paste2sawa is paused
payload.reason: Pushing v1.1.0, workflow and UX improvements. Re-checking every 30 seconds.

added.title: Awaiting L3 Response bucket
added.sub: After Confirm Reported, rows move to a live-timer bucket. Over 20 min flags overdue. One-click Recheck, Resolved, Re-Escalate.

added.title: Copy Full Diagnostics
added.sub: One button copies a pre-formatted block with all 4 portal outputs, ready to paste into ticket notes.

added.title: Open SAC button
added.sub: Jumps straight to your already-open SAC tab. No tab hunting.

added.title: Smarter Report Helper
added.sub: OLT and FSP auto-fill from SAC-AM exception logs when ACS is offline. Copy now outputs values only, no labels.

added.title: Portal health dots
added.sub: Header dots show real-time login state for each portal tab so you spot a logged-out portal before searching.

added.title: New Optical Power and MAC check
added.sub: Feed a serial plus OLT name to get TX, RX, OLT power, temperature, and a MAC address check in one shot. No need to switch to Postman.
